wins: NIKE brand grew this quarter with a strong mix
North America delivered over 20% wholesale growth
Running business grew over 20% for the second consecutive quarter
NIKE Digital reduced promotional activity and is operating more strategically
Inventory is in a healthy and clean position in North America and EMEA
risks: China continues to face significant headwinds with a 16% revenue decline
Tariffs have added a significant headwind to gross margins
Inventory obsolescence in Greater China impacted gross margins
Earnings per share was $0.53, below expectations
The reset in China requires a fresh approach and new capabilities
